Configuration for pre-commit hooks using repositories for code formatting and linting checks.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines a set of pre-commit hooks for a version control system. It specifies three repositories, each with a unique URL and a specific revision hash, indicating the exact version of the repository to use. The `hooks` section lists the individual hooks to be executed from each repository. For example, the first repository includes hooks with IDs `ruff` and `ruff-format`, while the third repository includes hooks such as `check-merge-conflict` and `trailing-whitespace`. These hooks are used to automate code quality checks and enforce coding standards before changes are committed to the codebase.
